ground_truth.title: Tutoring
ground_truth.main_content: Tutoring support is available from multiple departments. Many of our services are peer led which connects you to other students who found success in the same subject. Benefits of tutoring include: review key course concepts, one-to-one study time, and develop new study approaches. The Tutoring & Academic Success Center provides peer tutors for over 250 subject areas including math, biology, physics, chemistry, writing, and more. Peer tutoring aims to help students develop the academic study skills and confidence needed to succeed in their courses. At the Multicultural Center for Academic Excellence, peer tutors provide support for math, science, and more. Department-based academic support is available at tutor/help labs in Chemistry, CLA language program, CSci Tutor Room, Physics help lab, and Spanish & Portuguese lab. Student English Language Support (SELS) offers free, 45-minute consultations to multilingual undergraduate students to help further develop their English skills including speaking, listening, pronunciation, reading, writing, and intercultural communication.
with: Tutoring support is available from multiple departments. Many of our services are peer led which connects you to other students who found success in the same subject.
Peer tutors provide support for over 250 subject areas including math, biology, physics, chemistry, writing, and more.
Peer tutoring aims to help students develop the academic study skills and confidence needed to succeed in their courses.
Student English Language Support (SELS) offers free, 45-minute consultations to multilingual undergraduate students to help further develop their English skills.
During a consultation, students can work with trained consultants on any English language skill, including speaking, listening, pronunciation, reading, writing, and intercultural communication.

Academic Success Centers provide services to help undergraduate students succeed at the University
